indicators.name: Dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is too large and obstructs the view of the outside.

indicators.name: Chair
indicators.rationale: The chairs are too close together, making it difficult to move around.

indicators.name: Ceiling
indicators.rationale: The ceiling is too high, making it difficult to focus on the computer screen.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo) due to the obstruction caused by the dining table and chairs, as well as the high ceiling.
